sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111780" key="flidio/wnto" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φλιδιόωντο·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διέποντο, ἐτέμνοντο,</foreign> and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔφλιδεν·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διέρρεεν, ἐρρήγνυεν.</foreign> </entryFree>
